servicedAt.findings: First scheduled F7 filter change at 4 months. Filters moderately soiled. Heat recovery measured 84.2 %.
Filter change + duct inspection. Found loose insulation on duct to apartment 4.02 — secured.

servicedAt.technician: VentBalance Sp. z o.o. (Krzysztof Wójcik, TR-1234)
servicedAt.findings:
Full system rebalance per ISS-RETROCX-MVHR-001. Apartment 4.02 supply
increased from 60 to 70 m³/h on bedroom diffusers; whole-building
SFP rechecked at 0.48 W/(l/s) (slightly above design 0.45).
Filter change. Heat recovery 83.1 % (lower than baseline). Heat exchanger surface inspection recommended at 36-month service.

performanceTrend.notes: Within tolerance overall. Slight downward trend; heat-exchanger fouling suspected. Scheduled deep clean at 36-month service.

changelog.description: Operation-phase MVHR record — 19,200 runtime hours, 4 filter changes + 1 rebalance, heat recovery trending -2 % from baseline
